name: Anhui Huaqi Environmental Protection Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Huaqi Environmental Protection Technology Co., Ltd. offers sewage treatment plants. It engages in the technical research of biological aerated filter, engineering design, EPC, pollution control facility operation, BOT investment, and development and production of the matched products. It provides integrated sewage treatment equipment; vehicle-mounted treatment equipment; decontamination desanding products comprising micro-filter for BAF√Ç¬ñrotary and BAF special microfiltration machine-flat; methanol dosing; and BAF pool equipment. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Maanshan, China.
